content_fingerprint: llama cpp lands fast mat vec kernels for inline quantization in release b8951 the ggml org llama cpp project tagged release b8951 on april 27 centering on optimized matrix vector kernels for inline quantized weights with pre built binaries now covering a wider cross section of desktop mobile server and chinese os platforms the llama cpp project at ggml org issued release tag b8951 on april 27 2026 the same day the monitored release feed refreshed at 17 41 34 utc the headline change is the addition of fast mat vec matrix vector multiplication kernels for inline quantized weights merged under pu
